title: EQ - Two devices on one phone, change EQ on one device has no effect on the second device
scenario: EQ preset changes on one Poly device do not affect EQ settings on a second connected Poly device; each device maintains independent EQ settings
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Connect Device A (e.g., Poly Voyager 5200) to the phone via Bluetooth.
Navigate to Poly Studio Mobile → [Device A] → Audio Settings → Equalizer.
Select a custom EQ preset (e.g., 'Bass Boost') on Device A.
Connect Device B (e.g., Poly Voyager 4320) to the same phone via Bluetooth.
Navigate to Poly Studio Mobile → [Device B] → Audio Settings → Equalizer.
Observe the EQ preset currently selected on Device B.
expected: Device B's EQ preset remains unchanged and independent from Device A's EQ preset. Changing EQ on one device does not affect the other device's EQ settings.
